mapper.select: SELECT role_perms.id, role_perms.role_id, role_perms.permission_id, permission.name AS perm_name, permission.number AS perm_number FROM t_sys_role_perms role_perms LEFT JOIN t_sys_permission permission ON permission.id = role_perms.permission_id WHERE role_perms.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_sys_role_perms (id, role_id, permission_id, create_time, create_user) VALUES
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.roleId}, #{entity.permissionId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.createUser})
